title: metastelma brachystephanum
intro: Metastelma brachystephanum, also known as 'Mexican climbing milkweed', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Metastelma brachystephanum include relief from wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and crushing the plant to be used in capsules or tinctures.
